name: Country Rice Flan
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Short Grained Rice (washed and drained)
Powdered Sugar (mixed with a few pieces)
recipeInstructions:
To Make Pastry: Sift flour into a large bowl. Using a pastry blender or knives, cut in butter evenly. Lightly mix in sugar and egg to form a dough. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
To Make Filling: Bring milk to a boil with granulated sugar and butter in a medium saucepan. Stir in rice; reduce heat and simmer gently for 1 hour. Stir occasionally until the mixture is thick and creamy. Remove from heat. In a large bowl, beat eggs, cream cheese, and 1/2 cup candied lemon peel. Mix in ground cinnamon.
Assemble the flan by spreading the filling into a baking dish, placing it on a water bath, and topping with the pastry. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 45 minutes or until set. Let cool before serving.
